title: Speed
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'speed'?
What is the speed limit on the roads in your country?
Does speed kill?
Are you a speed freak? Do you love going fast?
What's the fastest speed you've ever been in a car at?
Why do people love speed so much?
Are our lives getting faster and faster?
What things can you do at lightning speed?
Mahatma Gandhi said: "There is more to life than simply increasing its speed." Do you agree?
Tadao Ando said: "The speed of change makes you wonder what will become of architecture." What do you think?
What do you think of speed?
What do you think of people who drive at very high speeds?
How important is speed in your life?
Do you need high speed Internet?
Would you like to travel at the speed of light?
Do you ever speed dial on your mobile?
Do you worry about speed cameras and speed checks on the roads?
Are you a speed reader?
Someone once said: "There are no speed limits on the road to excellence." What does this mean? Do you agree with it?
Confucius once said: "It does not matter how slowly you go, so long as you do not stop." Do you agree with him?
